features.title: Reject invalid CLI lifecycle and configuration before sandbox creation
features.description: Add preflight argument checks for lifecycle-sensitive commands and numeric/path configuration.
evidence: packages/sandbox_cli/cli.py rejects snapshot/domain lifecycle mismatches before Sandbox creation
tests/test_cli.py covers invalid global configuration without Sandbox creation

features.title: Document shipped public surfaces in product specs
features.description: Add product specs for CLI workflows, volume-backed snapshots, and Vercel-style conveniences.

features.title: Check the generated CLI schema contract
features.description: Add a generated CLI schema artifact or focused validation so schema drift is reviewable.
evidence: docs/generated/cli-schema.json generated from runtime CLI schema
tests/test_cli.py compares generated schema to cli._schema_payload()

features.title: Validate exec-plan state in CI and finish release governance
features.description: Wire exec-plan validation into CI and update release-facing governance notes.
evidence: CONTRIBUTING.md release checklist mentions generated contracts
docs/references/development.md release checklist includes exec-plan validation
CHANGELOG.md includes CI, schema, spec, and CLI preflight release notes
